title: Academies general annual grant allocation guides: 2025 to 2026
body: "Academies general annual grant (GAG) allocation guides for the 2025 to 2026 academic year  Read the guide alongside your 2025 to 2026 statement to understand the funding your academy will receive, how we’ve calculated it, the funding factors we’ve applied and the sources of the data used.  We have published information about the timetable for issuing GAG statements and how to access them.  "
